titleStmt.title:
The Secretary of State to Certain Diplomatic Officers
Sent to Embassies in Belgium, Netherlands, United Kingdom, and the Soviet Union.

head.hi: The Secretary of State to Certain Diplomatic Officers
head.note: Sent to Embassies in Belgium, Netherlands, United Kingdom, and the Soviet Union.

div.p:
(Infotel) See infotels, Feb 6, 2 p. m., and Feb 10, 7 p. m.Neither printed. Caffery reports after discussions with French Internatl Committee Red Cross
agreed participate in proposed plan by which German PW’s given choice of repatriation or remaining in France as voluntary workers. Internatl Committee issued statement that plan will be carried out under conditions complete freedom and PW’s will enjoy guarantees at least equivalent those provided by Geneva Convention. In discussions French reps stated their repatriation plan contemplates return PW’s at rate 31,000 a month with no distinction made between PW’s captured by French and those received from US.
